Easymap SDK Third-Party Open Source Notices

This file lists third-party open-source components bundled into or distributed with this Easymap SDK package. The proprietary Easymap SDK license is stated in EASYMAP-SDK-COMMERCIAL-NOTICE.txt / LICENSE.txt.

The inclusion of third-party open-source components does not make Easymap SDK open source, free software, public domain software, or redistributable software.

Dual-license policy:
When a third-party component is offered under multiple licenses, Easymap commercial distribution selects the permissive option where available. For example, JSZip is distributed under MIT OR GPLv3; this package selects the MIT license option and does not rely on GPLv3.

Copyleft policy:
GPL-only, AGPL-only, or other strong copyleft runtime components must not be bundled, linked, embedded, minified into, or distributed as part of Easymap commercial runtime unless explicitly reviewed and approved in writing. Development-only dependencies are not part of this runtime distribution.

Runtime components noticed for this Easymap SDK package:

- OpenLayers, BSD-2-Clause
- olcs / OL-Cesium integration, BSD-2-Clause
- proj4js, MIT
- regenerator-runtime, MIT
- JSZip, MIT option selected from MIT OR GPLv3
- ol-ext distributed files, BSD-3-Clause notice included with this package
- ieee754, BSD-3-Clause
- pbf, BSD-3-Clause
- rbush, MIT
- quickselect, ISC

Mapbox GL JS 1.x note:
The full Easymap distribution may include Mapbox GL JS under 7/mapbox/mapbox-gl.js. This package is pinned to the Mapbox GL JS 1.x line; the currently distributed file is Mapbox GL JS 1.13.2, licensed under BSD-3-Clause. This package does not bundle or load mapbox-gl by default. Do not upgrade or bundle Mapbox GL JS 2.x or later in Easymap commercial SDK without separate license review.

Cesium note:
This package includes basic 3D API glue but does not bundle the Cesium runtime by default. Deployments that provide Cesium must retain Cesium's Apache-2.0 notices according to the Cesium distribution used by that deployment.

JSTS note:
This package excludes JSTS buffer support by default. Full or plugin builds that bundle JSTS must include and review the JSTS EDL-1.0 / EPL-1.0 notices separately.

----

License: BSD-2-Clause

Copyright 2005-present, OpenLayers Contributors
All rights reserved.

Redistribution and use in source and binary forms, with or without modification, are permitted provided that the following conditions are met:

1. Redistributions of source code must retain the above copyright notice, this list of conditions and the following disclaimer.

2. Redistributions in binary form must reproduce the above copyright notice, this list of conditions and the following disclaimer in the documentation and/or other materials provided with the distribution.

THIS SOFTWARE IS PROVIDED BY THE COPYRIGHT HOLDERS AND CONTRIBUTORS "AS IS" AND ANY EXPRESS OR IMPLIED WARRANTIES, INCLUDING, BUT NOT LIMITED TO, THE IMPLIED WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY AND FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE ARE DISCLAIMED.
